mapper.select: SELECT id, conv_id as convId, user_id as userId, class_id as classId, share_token as shareToken, allow_continue as allowContinue, view_count as viewCount, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, is_deleted as isDeleted FROM conversation_share WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, conv_id as convId, user_id as userId, class_id as classId, share_token as shareToken, allow_continue as allowContinue, view_count as viewCount, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, is_deleted as isDeleted FROM conversation_share WHERE share_token = #{shareToken}

SELECT id, conv_id as convId, user_id as userId, class_id as classId, share_token as shareToken, allow_continue as allowContinue, view_count as viewCount, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, is_deleted as isDeleted FROM conversation_share WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, conv_id as convId, user_id as userId, class_id as classId, share_token as shareToken, allow_continue as allowContinue, view_count as viewCount, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, is_deleted as isDeleted FROM conversation_share WHERE class_id IS NULL AND is_deleted = 0
AND user_id IN
#{uid}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversation_share (conv_id, user_id, class_id, share_token, allow_continue, view_count, is_deleted) VALUES (#{convId}, #{userId}, #{classId}, #{shareToken}, #{allowContinue}, #{viewCount}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE conversation_share
class_id = #{classId},
allow_continue = #{allowContinue},
view_count = #{viewCount},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted},
WHERE id = #{id}
